name: Kaito Masaharu
description: Masaharu Kaito (海藤 正治, Kaitō Masaharu) is a major supporting character in Judgment and Lost Judgment, as well as the protagonist of "The Kaito Files" in Lost Judgment. He is the former lieutenant of the Matsugane Family, as well as the former manager of Charles. He is currently a private investigator at Yagami Detective Agency
creator: goronyajima
